title: Feature - Global Campaigns Dashboard
description: Implement a public global dashboard view listing all campaigns across the system, serving as the starting page.
execution_steps: Implement public GET /campaigns/all endpoint in backend returning all campaigns.
Create GlobalCampaignList.tsx React component matching UIC-007.
Update App.tsx so GlobalCampaignList is the starting view for unauthenticated users, and provide navigation links.
definition_of_done: Starting page displays a global list of all campaigns to everyone.
Code contains @trace annotations for the task.
